name: China Cyts Tours Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: China Cyts Tours Holding Co., Ltd. operates as a tour operator in China. It offers inbound, domestic, and outbound travel services; conferences and exhibitions services; and technical support, travel-affiliated resources development, and online information services. The company also operates ChinaTravelDepot.com, a travel Website that offers a range of travel services, such as tour packages, cruise, hotel, flight, car rental, and international travel services; and offers airport transfer, tour guides, and fleet of luxury buses. It operates through a network of approximately 60 chain stores and outlets in China, as well as 3 branch offices in Hong Kong, Japan, and North America. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
